headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Teradyne (TER) After A 248% One-Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if Teradyne at around US$297 a share still offers value or if most of the opportunity is already priced in? This article walks through what the current price might be implying. The stock has delivered a 248.3% return over the last year and is up 43.3% year to date, even with a 9.6% pullback over the past month and a 1.7% slip in the last week. Recent coverage has focused on Teradyne's role in semiconductors and automation, along with the broader interest in testing and robotics...
